items.text:
# **Headshots that help casting imagine you in the role.**

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

[https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk](https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk)

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: Shortlisted for one thing and two self tapes from my lovely agent today 🙌🏼🤩

items.text:
COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL- Looking for Male Youth Swimmers, or swim team! Ages 8-15 years old.

My name is Taylor Long, and I'm a Casting Associate with Sean Milliken Casting.

We're currently casting an upcoming insurance commercial and are looking for male youth swimmers, approximately 8–15 years old. We're hoping to cast a full swim team, with opportunities for both featured extras and background roles.

I have a document with more information about the project, including filming dates and details on how parents or guardians can get in touch if they're interested in learning more. Please reach out!

We'd greatly appreciate it if you could share this opportunity with any swimmers or families who may be interested. It could be a fun and exciting experience for young athletes!

Thank you so much for your time and support. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out, I’d be happy to help!

The financial rates are, if booked as an extra- $300.00 per person or, if upgraded to a featured extra, $2,500 per person.

Warm regards,

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'SEAN MILLIKEN CASTING COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL WE ARE LOOKING FOR: MALE YOUTH SWIM TEAMS- AGED 8-15 YEARS FOR AN INSURANCE COMMERCIAL MUST BE REAL SWIMMERS MUST BE AVAILABLE JUNE 16th-21st FEATURED EXTRA OR EXTRA RATE IF THIS IS YOU, OR ANYONE YOU KNOW, PLEASE EMAIL SMC.ASST@GMAIL.COM'

topComments.text: Hi there I emailed you my son swimming :)

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED FOR INDIE FEATURE FILM** 🎬

We're looking for **2 volunteer background actors** for a scene in an independent feature film shooting at **Stanley Park**.

**Roles Needed:**
• 1 Female (Age 30–60)
• 1 Male (Age 30–60)
• Ethnicity: Caucasian 

📍 **Location:** Stanley Park, Vancouver
📅 **Date:** June 6, Saturday.
🕒 **Call Time:** 3:00 PM, the shoot will be done in 2hrs.

*Please note that the shooting time may change slightly on the day. We will keep selected participants updated, so please be available and keep your phone nearby.*

**Scene Description:**
Our lead characters are trying to take a selfie together when two friendly passersby offer to help by taking the photo. It's a simple, fun interaction with a small amount of on-camera presence.

• **Volunteer** position
• **Film credit** provided
• **Craft services** (snacks and refreshments) provided

If you're interested, please send us a message with your head shot, showreel, name and age at **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**. Feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit!

**Submission deadline 6th June 2026, 12pm.**

Thank you for supporting independent filmmaking! 🎥

The Dinner Detective is currently casting!

All roles paid and scheduling happens one month at a time based on your availability!

To be considered for the virtual audition, you must email your pic and resume to dinnerdetectiveauditions@gmail.com with your audition city in the subject line. If selected, you will then receive a character breakdown, show pay details and an audition form to fill out and send back.

The Dinner Detective is currently casting!

All roles paid and scheduling happens one month at a time based on your availability!

To be considered for the virtual audition, you must email your pic and resume to dinnerdetectiveauditions@gmail.com with your audition city in the subject line. If selected, you will then receive a character breakdown, show pay details and an audition form to fill out and send back.
items.title: The Dinner Detective is currently casting!

items.text: Day 2 in New York. Such a blessing...so I gave God some of my time!

items.text:
Hope Among The Cosmos Student Film Deadline Extension (June 10th, Wed)
CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th), with a possible pick-up shot date in early October (TBA).

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

XANDER — Male, 30s-40s
The father. Big presence, quiet intensity, he carries a lot of weight but doesn't talk about. Physical role, but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA — Female, 12-15
Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

YOUNG XANDER — Male, 8-11
A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial. 

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com

Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]
Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. and request the sides, and they will be sent immediately.

items.text:
🚨 WARSZAWA!!!!! PILNE 12.06!!!! 🚨
Na plan serialu „Gliniarze” poszukujemy epizodysty do roli:

🎬 Dłużnik (30–40 lat) – ćpun, szczupła sylwetka.

✅ Dwie sceny

💰 Wynagrodzenie: 300 zł (płatne przelewem)

📍 Warszawa

🕙 Plan w godzinach: 10:00–13:20

📧 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na: Casting.outset@interia.pl

W treści zgłoszenia:

• Imię i nazwisko

• Wiek

• Wzrost

• Numer telefonu

• Aktualne zdjęcie twarzy

❗ Prosimy o dołączenie wizytówki aktorskiej lub nagranej scenki. Zgłoszenia bez wizytówki/scenki nie będą rozpatrywane.

sharedPost.text:
Do serialu, szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn. jako tłum witający burmistrza.  
Mężczyźni i kobiety w wieku 17 - 65 lat 

 
Link do zgłoszenia - Mężczyźni 
https://casting-app.pl/apply/8f1c83ac90fa4ce6a0e141f93642e5e1

Link do zgloszenia - Kobiety
https://casting-app.pl/apply/ca368cbcbd26454fa85c64a5ccff2622

📍 Termin zdjęć: 23 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Grójec, wyjazd z Warszawy transportem produkcyjnym o 6:00 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne 
💰 Stawka: 130 zł za dzień zdjęciowy - (płatne gotówką po planie) 

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez link.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '23.06 Statyści Grójec (transport z Warszawy)'

items.text:
✨ Ruch ma moc, którą ciągle odkrywamy…
Czy czujesz, że nadszedł czas na kolejny krok na Twojej ścieżce zawodowej? Pracujesz z ludźmi ale chcesz wyjść poza schematy i poznać nowe metody pracy? 🌿
Jako absolwentka mam dla Ciebie coś, co wiem, że zdecydownie Ci w tym pomoże…

📆 27-28 czerwca w Warszawie odbędzie się warsztat wstępny z Choreoterapii: „Poznaj(my) się w tańcu i ruchu”, które poprowadzi niesamowita dr Anna Glińska-Lachowicz 💃
To nie jest zwykłe szkolenie... 
To weekendowa podróż i preludium do rocznego, certyfikowanego kursu ✨️ (start już 3 października!) 
[Więcej informacji o kursie: https://share.google/GQ6DGsLnPeyjT5YIr ]

🌈Co zabierzesz ze sobą po tych 2 dniach (13h praktyki)?

items.summary:
✨ Ruch ma moc, którą ciągle odkrywamy…
Czy czujesz, że nadszedł czas na kolejny krok na Twojej ścieżce zawodowej? Pracujesz z ludźmi ale chcesz wyjść poza schematy i poznać nowe metody pracy? 🌿
Jako absolwentka mam dla Ciebie coś, co wiem, że zdecydownie Ci w tym pomoże…

📆 27-28 czerwca w Warszawie odbędzie się warsztat wstępny z Choreoterapii: „Poznaj(my) się w tańcu i ruchu”, które poprowadzi niesamowita dr Anna Glińska-Lachowicz 💃
To nie jest zwykłe szkolenie... 
To weekendowa podróż i preludium do rocznego, certyfikowanego kursu ✨️ (start już 3 października!)

items.text:
🎬 **1 Day Adult Intro to the American Accent — Brisbane**
*An intensive with Sandra Bell*

Learn from one of Australia's most experienced dialect coaches — and walk away with showreel footage.

📅 **Saturday 27 June 2026**
🕙 **10am – 4:30pm**
📍 **Queensland Headshots, 1192 Stanley St East, Coorparoo QLD**
💵 **$260 standard | $240 returning students** (GST inc.)

**What's included:**
* Hands-on American accent coaching: placement, rhythm and the sounds that give it away
* Targeted exercises that build the accent into your body, not just your ear
* Performance work with scenes on their feet, under real pressure
* A filmed US accent scene captured on the day
* A green screen newsreader scene, edited and delivered
* Showreel-ready footage you can submit straight away

**About Sandra Bell:**
32 years as one of Australia's most sought-after American accent dialect coaches. 1,000+ students. National workshops. 18 years teaching 3rd year drama students at QUT. 20+ years with TAFTA.

⚠️ **Only 12 places. Minimum 8 for the day to run.**

👉 Book at queenslandheadshots.com/sandrabell
📧 [info@queenslandheadshots.com](mailto:info@queenslandheadshots.com) | 📞 0403 871 686

**CASTING CALL –** ***OMG Stories ***

Hi, my name is Mireille and I’m a Casting Agent at Upstream Media leading the search for contributors for the ongoing series ***OMG Stories: Up Close.*** We are looking for individuals with extraordinary lived experiences who would be interested in sharing their story in their own words.

**Details:**

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Shoot dates: Ongoing
💷 Paid opportunity (£££)

**Requirements:**
• All ages welcome
• All genders welcome
• Must be based in the UK or willing to travel

**If you’re interested, please send:**
• A brief summary of your story
• A video link or self-tape

📧 Email: [mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk](mailto:mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk)

items.text:
Casting Call
Chapter Three Productions are casting SHIPS, a new play premiering in Leith at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe.

We are particularly keen to hear from actors from Black,South Asian, mixed-race, and other underrepresented backgrounds for a major role central to the production.

CONNOR: Merchant seaman, mid 30s–mid 40s. Leither. A complex, emotionally demanding role exploring trauma, loneliness, addiction, identity, and the struggle to reconnect with home and self. Open auditions will be held in Edinburgh in May 2026. 

If interested, please send a CV and headshot to: shipsleith@yahoo.com

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 24/2026

DER ERSTE KONTAKT? DOKU ÜBER EINEN KULTFILM SOWIE 2 UNTERSCHIEDLICHE INTERVIEWS

Was wäre, wenn du herausfinden würdest, dass wir nicht allein sind? Angenommen, jemand könnte dir das beweisen: Hättest du Angst? Kultregisseur Steven Spielberg gibt uns nicht nur eine Wortspende, sondern stellt auch gleich selbst seinen Film DISCLOSURE DAY vor.

AUSSER ATEM gehört zweifellos zu den großen Filmklassikern. Doch was ist die Geschichte dahinter? NOUVELLE VAGUE wirft einen Blick auf die Dreharbeiten von Jean-Luc Godards bahnbrechendem Krimidrama – mit viel Liebe zum Detail, zahlreichen Verweisen und Humor.

Ebba Sinzinger ist eine bekannte österreichische Regisseurin, Drehbuchautorin und Filmproduzentin, die in Wien lebt und arbeitet. Sie ist vor allem für ihre engagierten Dokumentarfilme  vielen ein Begriff. Hinsichtlich ihres neuesten Filmes DIE KUNST KOMPLIZEN konnten wir mit ihr ein Interview führen.

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel.Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

Abgerundet wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 10.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

sharedPost.text:
✨ Tag 1 von 5 – Stimmtraining ✨
Was für ein spannender Auftakt! 🎶
Heute haben wir uns als Gruppe kennengelernt und sind direkt tief in die faszinierende Welt der Stimme eingetaucht. 🗣️🔬

 Gemeinsam haben wir die Anatomie des Vokaltrakts erkundet und untersucht, wie unterschiedliche Stimmfarben und Stimmqualitäten entstehen. Außerdem haben wir uns mit den Schwingungsformen der Stimmlippen beschäftigt und die Brücke zwischen aktueller Forschung und praktischer Anwendung geschlagen. 📚🎤

Natürlich durfte auch das Singen nicht fehlen! 🎶 Jede*r Teilnehmende hatte zudem die Gelegenheit, an einem eigenen Stück zu arbeiten und individuelle Impulse für die weitere Entwicklung mitzunehmen. 🌱✨

Ich freue mich auf die kommenden Tage, auf viele spannende Erkenntnisse, inspirierende Gespräche und darauf, die Stimmen weiter wachsen und leuchten zu sehen. 🎵💫

📌Formation de la voix /Stimmtraining im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online

items.text:
SWIMMING IN RED
A Psychological Thriller Series by Eneme Studios

Hello everyone,

My name is Elvira Nsibi Eneme, founder of Eneme Studios.

I’m currently building something from the ground up — a dream, a vision, and a creative space for passionate artists who want to grow together. While this project is currently low budget, I truly believe every great studio starts somewhere. I’m looking for dedicated actors and crew members who want to create powerful work, gain high-quality material for their reel/portfolio, and become part of a strong independent filmmaking team.

✨ PROJECT DETAILS

🎥 Project: “Swimming in Red”

Genre: Psychological Thriller / Suspense Series

📍 Filming Location: North Hollywood, Los Angeles

📅 Shooting Schedule: Mainly Sundays (starting June)

💰 Compensation: UNPAID / Collaborative (Low Budget)

What we offer:

• IMDb & screen credits

• Professionally edited footage for reels/portfolios

• Networking opportunities

• Creative collaboration

• Catering on set

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SWIMING IN RED

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎥 CREW CALL (STILL NEEDED)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

We are actively looking  for the following crew positions:

• Director of Photography (DP) / Cinematographer

Assistant DP / Camera Assistant

Sound Mixer / Sound

Sound Assistant

Assistant Director (AD)

Script Supervisor / Continuity

DIT (Digital Imaging Technician)

Colorist (Post-Production)

Art Department Assistant (Production Design / Props / Set Dressing)

Gaffer / Lighting Technician

Hair & Makeup / Costume

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Please email:

📧 enemestudios90@gmail.com

Include:

• Resume 

• Recent photos/headshots

• Reel, self-tape, portfolio or work Instagram (if any)

• Role/crew position you’re applying for

• Confirmation of Sunday availability

👉 CREW DP – Your Name

Thank you so much to everyone supporting independent cinema and new creators. Let’s build something unforgettable together. 🩸🎬

items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!) 

#beginnersdance #Liverpool #somethingtodo #tryitchallenge #liverpoolfitness

items.text:
Casting Call
Hi, I am the sole creator of a horror analogue series called The Haven Archivist. I am looking for 3 male actors and 1 female actress to fill certain characters. Project details: any scripts sent need to be filmed in a self tape format, project is unpaid. Please email me at Thehollowreturn@outlook.com if interested

Characters: 

Subject 7714 (Finch). Male, early 20s

Nigel Harrow. Current version of the main antagonist, late 40s, White

Kerion Marsh, brother of a missing journalist, late 20s to early 30s

Marian Scargill, director of Haven in the 90s, female, age late 30s to 40s

There will be other roles available as well

topComments.text: Where, when and any expenses offered?
What's the plan for it after you complete it?

items.title: Casting Call

items.text:
Paid Casting Call
🎬 CASTING CALL – FATHER’S DAY COMMERCIAL

We are casting for a heartfelt Father’s Day commercial filming in East London.

⸻

⚽ NICK (Child, Playing Age 6–12)

Nick is a football-loving child who dreams of one day playing on the world’s biggest stages. Training is not always easy, and setbacks are part of the journey, but Nick never gives up. No matter what happens, they know their father will always be there to support them.

Requirements:

✅ Any gender

✅ Any ethnicity

✅ Playing age 6–12

✅ Basic football skills (comfortable dribbling, passing, and shooting)

✅ Must have football boots/trainers and suitable sportswear for filming

✅ Comfortable following direction on set

✅ Natural and confident on camera

⸻

🚖 JEREMY (Male, Playing Age 28–45)

Jeremy is a ride-hailing driver and lifelong football enthusiast. Although he never fulfilled his own football dream, he now dedicates his time and energy to helping his child pursue theirs. He is not a man of many words, but through his presence, encouragement, and countless fist bumps, he shows unwavering support and love.

Requirements:

✅ Any ethnicity

✅ Playing age 28–45

✅ Strong natural and emotional acting ability

✅ Must hold a valid driving licence and be comfortable driving on camera

✅ Must have well-fitted sportswear and trainers suitable for filming

✅ Warm, approachable, and believable fatherly presence

✅ Football experience or interest is a plus

⸻

📍 Location: Stratford / Canary Wharf / Isle of Dogs area, East London (TBC)

📅 Shoot Date: 13–15th (one day within this window, TBC)

🎥 Project: A heartfelt Father’s Day commercial about family, encouragement, and chasing dreams through football.

⸻

To apply, please send:

• Recent photos/headshots

• Age

• Location

• Acting experience (if any)

• Contact details

📩 Please DM for further details or tag someone who may be suitable for these roles.

E-mail：wangxueshijia2023@hotmail.com

⭐ Real father-and-child pairs are encouraged to apply and may be given priority, although individual applications are equally welcome.

Serious enquiries only. 🎬⚽❤️

items.text:
💚 WEST END SUMMER WORKSHOP – SHREK THE MUSICAL! 💚
Looking for an unforgettable summer experience for your child?

Join us this August for our West End Summer Workshop, where young performers will rehearse and perform Shrek The Musical in just 5 days! Ages 6-16

⭐ Train with West End stars

⭐ Learn from industry professionals

⭐ Develop confidence and performance skills

⭐ Make new friends and have fun

⭐ Receive your very own workshop T-shirt

⭐ Perform in a fantastic final showcase

📅 Monday 3rd – Friday 7th August

📍 Babington House School, Chislehurst

💷 £250 per student

👨‍👩‍👧 Sibling Discount: £230

🐦 Early Bird Rate: £225

Whether your child is an experienced performer or taking their first steps into musical theatre, this workshop is packed with creativity, confidence-building and fun!

🎟️ Spaces are limited – book now to avoid disappointment.

📞 0203 301 0620

📧 infoexpressivearts@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
Ich bin glücklich!

Glücklich über jeden Tag an dem es mir soweit gut geht, glücklich das meine Leidenschaft mein Beruf sein kann, glücklich das ich sein darf was ich bin - ein Mensch! 

Und wenn ich das Mikrofon in die Hand nehme, auf Play drücke und meine Energie, meine Interpretation von Kunst an die Menschen weitergebe die es wertschätzen, dann ist diese kleine Welt in Ordnung.

Ich habe mal die Kamera mitlaufen lassen und euch ein kleines Medley zusammengestellt. 🎶

Worin findet ihr euer tägliches Glück?

Schreibt es in die Kommentare ☀️
.
.
.
#probe #mathiasmariekaiser #glück #livegesang #medley

items.text:
Ich bin glücklich!

Glücklich über jeden Tag an dem es mir soweit gut geht, glücklich das meine Leidenschaft mein Beruf sein kann, glücklich das ich sein darf was ich bin - ein Mensch! 

Und wenn ich das Mikrofon in die Hand nehme, auf Play drücke und meine Energie, meine Interpretation von Kunst an die Menschen weitergebe die es wertschätzen, dann ist diese kleine Welt in Ordnung.

Ich habe mal die Kamera mitlaufen lassen und euch ein kleines Medley zusammengestellt. 🎶

Worin findet ihr euer tägliches Glück?

Schreibt es in die Kommentare ☀️
.
.
.
#probe #mathiasmariekaiser #glück #livegesang #medley

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — PAID — Older Male Actor for Short Film — Katy/Houston**

Hi everyone, I’m casting an older male actor for a paid short proof-of-concept film shooting in the Katy/Houston area.

We’re especially looking for someone with a grandfatherly presence, strong emotional range, and ideally some theatre experience.

**Project**: Short proof-of-concept film

**Shoot Date**: Friday, June 19 (night shoot)

**Location**: Katy / Houston area

**Compensation**: Paid

**Genre/Tone**: Dramatic, character-driven

The film centers on a charged meeting between a young man and an eccentric older poet inside a dark, atmospheric study.

**CASTING: EDMUND**

Looking for an older male actor, playing age roughly **60–80**.

Edmund is a warm, eccentric, theatrical older poet — grandfatherly, charming, funny. He can be childlike and playful in one moment, then suddenly shift into accusation, wounded anger, and passionate intensity.

This is a very performance-driven role with a lot of emotional shifts — from humor and playfulness to volatility and anger, and finally vulnerability. The role can be theatrical, but it should still feel human and truthful, not exaggerated or cartoonish.

This is a dialogue-heavy role and would be ideal for an actor with theatre experience, strong presence, and emotional depth.

**British accent required.**

Theatrical/classical background is a plus.

More information on the role and project: [https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford](https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford)

**TO APPLY**

Email preferred: [your email]

Subject line: EDMUND— [Your Name]

Please include:

Name

Role/position you’re applying for

Location

Relevant experience

Actor headshot/reel/resume, or crew reel/website/credits

Availability on June 19

DMs are also okay, and referrals are very welcome — especially for older actors with theatre experience.

Project website for more context: junipervalleyfilm.com

Thank you!
items.previewDescription: A role of theatrical force and hidden grief. It is within this room that the film’s central confrontation unfo...

items.text:
🚗 AUSTIN, TX CASTING CALL 🚗
Are you local to the Austin area? Do you have a valid drivers license and a car? Put those to good use and submit to our casting!!

*CASTING REAL PEOPLE* (non-union) for a commercial that will film in the Austin area. We are interviewing real people on their opinions, as well as filming them driving their cars. Must be comfortable driving on camera in both highway and residential areas.

DEMO: All ages (18+), genders, and ethnicities are encouraged to apply.

PAYMENT: $500, for a half day of cruising - 4-5 hours total. *Must be able to fill out payroll/I-9 paperwork*

Film Usage: Online, Digital, and New Media

Territory: Domestic and Global

Usage Term: In-Perpetuity

LINK TO SUBMIT:

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE SUPPORTING LEAD ROLE (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Independent comedy short film is seeking a Latina actress or an actress who can portray a Latin woman for the role of Sofia filming in Miami, FL.

ROLE: SOFIA
Female, 40s or older preferred. Confident, lively, flirtatious, and larger than life. Sofia has a strong screen presence with expressive reactions and natural comedic instincts. The role contains minor dialogue but strong comedic visual scenes and physical comedy throughout.

Must be comfortable wearing high heels and appearing significantly taller than the male lead (5’5”). Preferred if actress is 5’7” or taller.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Location: Miami, Florida
📅 Shoot Date: June, Exact date TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY (Must not be SAG-AFTRA)
• Strong comedic timing, facial expressions, and physical comedy skills
• Confident, charismatic on-camera presence
• Salsa or basic dance ability is a plus 
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Reel and/or video sample REQUIRED

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot, reel and/or video sample, and current location to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Sofia Submission

Serious and available talent only.

items.text:
It took 40 years, but I made it! I am in New York, New York! Yes, I slayed my audition on Saturday,  June 6, 2026 for Acting and Modeling with two bars of singing in my monologue with W Talent! Now I am just chilling and enjoying the city! 

Backstory I was invited to an  audition at 19 and my Dad said "No!" I respected that. Rest in peace, Dad. Forty years later, I was invited to an audition, I said "Yes!" So happy to finally make it to this big city! Thank you, God for giving me a second chance.  Love y'all. 

(Side note for Dermotologists and Cosmetologists, if you recognize the skin rash on my face - please help. I have noticed other women my age with it too. Hopefully it is not age related. Anyway help if you know what it is. My doctors are baffled, even after a biopsy. God bless.)

items.text:
Ladies!!! Tag a friend that's in one of these fields

🎬 CASTING CALL: FEMALED TALENT WANTED FOR MUSIC VIDEO 🎬

BBR Indie Films is seeking dynamic, authentic female talent for an upcoming professional music video shoot. We are looking for women who can powerfully embody the following roles:
 
Skilled Trades & Labor:
Mechanics, Construction Workers, Welders, etc

Civil & Community Heroes: Firefighters, Judge, Police or Detective, Mail Carriers / Couriers

Athletes & Performers:
 Ballet Dancers, Tap, Hip Hop dancers 
 Sports Players (Track & Field, Softball, Basketball, etc.)

📋 COMPENSATION
 IMDb Credit Provided
 Meals Provided on Set

Location: Atlanta, GA

 ✉️ HOW TO APPLY
If you fit any of the descriptions above, please submit your application to:

📧 info@bbrmediagroup.com
Submission Requirements:
Please respond with a recent photograph, preferably showcasing you in your uniform, work gear, or athletic attire. SUBJECT:  Female Talent

Join us on set and help bring this vision to life!

items.text:
FEATURE FILM TABLE READ

Mythological • Science Fiction • Horror

Do you love epic storytelling, powerful characters, ancient mythology, and supernatural suspense?

Trilokam Entertainment is seeking talented actors and performers for an exclusive Zoom table read of an upcoming feature-length Mythological Science Fiction Horror film.

 Indian Actors Preferred  All experience levels welcome  Opportunity to explore unique and compelling characters  Network with fellow actors and creatives

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 DATE June 21, 2026

 TIME 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM

 LOCATION Zoom (Link provided upon selection)

 FORMAT • Complete script read-through • Two full readings of the screenplay • Character exploration and discussion

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 SEEKING ACTORS WHO CAN BRING TO LIFE: • Heroes and Heroines • Mythological Figures • Warriors and Sages • Villains and Supernatural Beings • Modern and Futuristic Characters

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 INTERESTED?

Send your: • Name • Acting Experience (if any) • Headshot or Photo (optional) • Contact Information

TO:

trilokamentertainment@gmail.com

Subject Line: TABLE READ SUBMISSION

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

"Ancient Powers. Future Worlds. Unspeakable Horrors."

Presented by TRILOKAM ENTERTAINMENT

Spaces are limited. Submit today to reserve your opportunity to participate.

items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

items.text:
**Looking for an iPhone Camera Operator**

Need someone for a one day shoot this Saturday (4 hours).

You'll be filming TikTok style content using:
* iPhone 17 Pro
* DJI wireless microphones
* Portable LED light

Equipment is provided. Just need an operator who knows how to move quickly, capture clean social content, and work comfortably with an iPhone setup.

Paid gig.

If interested, DM:
* Your experience shooting social content
* A few examples of your work

Location: Pasadena, CA
Date: Saturday
Duration: 4 hours

items.text:
Das neue Streaming Bundle für Unter uns Fans #unteruns #hbomax #rtl+ #rtlplus 

https://youtube.com/shorts/sRtW50ssRrA 

Mein Moment im Büroloft von „Unter uns“

Diese Woche durfte ich bei „Unter uns“ in den @mmcstudios Köln als Nebenrollendarsteller mit Text vor der Kamera stehen. Die Szene spielte im Büroloft zwischen Huber & Huber Bauvision und Goldberg Superior Cologne. Mehr darf ich nicht verraten.

@actpm Patrick Müller als Tobias Lassner

Patrick verkörpert seit 2006 Tobias Lassner, einen erfolgreichen Anwalt mit kühler Fassade und weichem Kern. Seine Verbindung zu Leo macht diese Figur besonders menschlich und erzählerisch stark im Ensemble.

@miriam_lahnstein Miriam Lahnstein als Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg

Miriam spielt Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg, eine selbstbewusste Unternehmerin mit Machtinstinkt, Charme und Konsequenz. Als Mutter von Stella verkörpert sie Kontrolle, Ehrgeiz und familiäre Spannung mit großer Präsenz vor der Kamera.

@harun.yildirim_official Harun Yildirim als Ferhat Gülek

Harun spielt Ferhat Gülek, Architekt, Vater von Baris und Esma sowie Noch-Ehemann von Dana. Seine Figur bringt Charme, Lebensfreude und emotionale Bewegung in die Serie und in die Schillerallee hinein.

Wertschätzung am Set

Besonders wertvoll war das ruhige, respektvolle Miteinander der UFA-Produktion. In den MMC Studios Köln spürt man Präzision, Vertrauen, Timing und Teamgeist hinter jeder Szene und jedem gemeinsamen Moment am Set.

Jetzt ansehen und dranbleiben

Wenn Ihr „Unter uns“ verfolgt, achtet gern auf diese Figuren. Die Serie läuft jeden Abend bei @rtl_de und ist auf @rtlplus streambar. Teil 2 findet Ihr im Kanal von @sandras.social.media.creation (Sandra Wötzel) zum Weiterlesen.

Christian Weiße aka @christian_weisse_digi_content

#UnterUns #RTL #RTLPlus #UFASerialDrama #MMCStudios

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

**MALE GYMNAST NEEDED to play a body double Location   (LONDON)**

@everyone We're urgently looking for **experienced gymnasts** for an exciting upcoming production in **London**.

This is a **fantastic opportunity to be part of an amazing production** and is a **paid role**.

**Important:** Applicants must be between **5'7" and 5'10"** as this role is for a **body/ stand in  double for a well -known artist **.

Please share with anyone suitable in your network.

If interested, please send your details, recent photos, height, and any relevant gymnastics or stunt experience.

We'd love to hear from you! 🎬🤸‍♀️🤸‍♂️#**gymnasts #castingcall #marksummerscasting #marksummers #castingcall **#ukcasting

items.text:
KentKasper.net 

The Headline: The 24/7 Celebrity Mentor (Your Secret Weapon in a Town That Eats Hopes for Breakfast)

Forget everything you think you know about "acting coaches."

In an industry where 90% of actors quit within a few years—swallowed by the noise, the rejection, and the chaos—you need more than just a teacher. You need a lifeline. You need a strategist, a therapist, a hype-man, and a legal mind who knows exactly where the Hollywood minefields are buried.

You need Kent Kasper.

Having Kent on your team isn't just hiring a coach. It’s like having a 24/7 concierge for your career. It’s having someone in your corner who ensures that while the other 90% are tapping out, you’re stepping up.

---

What is Kent? He’s the "Swiss Army Knife" of Show Business.

· Part Mentor: Who extracts the gold from your gut and puts it on the screen.
· Part Life Coach: Who keeps you sane when the silence is deafening.
· Part Teacher: Who hands you the tools.
· Part Guide: Who walks you through the dark.
· A splash of Muse: To spark the fire.
· A dash of Magic: Because let's face it, you need it in Tinseltown.

Kent Kasper is the Master Power Coach who proves that "luck" is just a fancy word for what happens when opportunity meets preparation. And no one—and I mean no one—prepares you like Kent.

---

The Résumé of a Warrior (And Why It Matters to You)

Kent isn’t a theorist. He’s a SAG-AFTRA working actor with 40+ years of blood, sweat, and applause. He has navigated the very trenches you’re trying to cross.

· The Laughs: A national headlining comedian for over a decade. (HBO, Showtime, Netflix, Comedy Central—yeah, those stages).
· The Credits: Co-starred in over 25 TV shows (Mad Men, Monk, Rules of Engagement) and 20 films (Apollo 13, Space Jam).
· The Face: Starred in over 200 commercials. (If you’ve watched TV in the last 20 years, you’ve seen him).
.  Veteran of over a dozen vertical micro dramas.
· The Icon: For 18 years, he was the go-to Dr. Phil lookalike—doubling for him in commercials, films, and private events.
· The Legal Eagle: He holds a master degree and a law degree from Thurgood Marshall School of Law and served as a NYC Assistant District Attorney. (He knows how to read contracts so you don't have to cry later).
. Author of 4 acting books on Amazon 
. Corporate Trainer -Consultant - Keynote speaker to top Fortune 500 companies..

His Philosophy: "Don't Fight Your Type, Master It!"

---

The Kent Kasper Difference: The "Concierge" Treatment

Most coaches give you a one-hour slot and send you on your way. Kent gives you systems.

His laser-focused, battle-tested methodology covers 100+ essential areas of the biz that most actors don’t even know exist. We’re talking:

· Audition Preparation: Turning your nerves into nuclear weapons. Booking the room!

· The Trinity (Agent/Manager/CD Blitzes): Getting you in the rooms that matter
.
· Branding, Marketing & Packaging: Turning you from a "hopeful" into a product Hollywood wants to buy.

· Demo Tape Preparation: Because your reel is your resume.

.Vertical micro drama prep .

.Photo shoot branding & packaging 

Working with Kent increases your opportunities by 1000%. And when those opportunities come? He prepares you like a heavyweight boxer stepping into the ring with Iron Mike Tyson. You won't just survive; you'll dominate.

---

Who Has Kent Coached?

Everyone. Literally.

From diapers to Depends..

He’s worked with families, couples,toddlers tweens ,teens ,seniors and friends. He’s helped firefighters, doctors, lawyers, bus drivers, teachers, veterans, chefs, and salesmen drop their day-job identities and pick up their acting dreams.

Whether you’re in your living room or on the other side of the globe, Kent is there. Sessions are available in-person, or via FaceTime, Zoom, Instagram, and Facebook Messenger.

---

The Bottom Line (Irresistible Edition)

You can try to navigate the Hollywood minefield alone. You can hope for a lucky break. You can be one of the 90% who bows out.

Or, you can have a 24/7 ally.

You can have a man who has been a lawyer, corporate trainer , a professional union actor , published author , a comedian, a TV star, a Dr. Phil celebrity look alike and a mentor to thousands. You can have someone who answers the call when you're panicking before an audition, who strategizes when you're lost, and who celebrates when you win.

There is no other coach on this planet with the background, the care, and the relentless drive of Kent Kasper.

This is your invitation. Let’s get to work…
items.title: Kent Kasper - Acting Coach

items.text: Hi everyone! We have a film about how busy and exhausting working and dating in London is. It will be a short of about ten minutes. We would need a leading man. The filming would take place over 2 or 3 days most likely in July in central London as well as another area to be determined, as we need a couple of indoor locations. Travel expenses and meals would be offered/compensated. If anyone is interested please DM me!

VANCOUVER CASTING CALL: COURTING YOU

Project Type: BookTok/Teaser Trailer

**Compensation: Demo reel material (plus be a part of something fun!)**

**Ideal for actors looking to build romantic lead footage and on-screen chemistry scenes for their demo reel.**

Union Status: **Non-union performers only, please.**

Director/Casting Director: Brianne Hogan

Contact Information: brianne.hogan@gmail.com

Audition Location: Self-tape

Submission Deadline: **June 21, 2026**

Shooting Date: **July 11, 2026**

Shooting Location: Vancouver (TBD)

Shoot Length: Approximately 2–3 hours maximum. 

**SYNOPSIS**

Based on my upcoming e-book, Courting You, this contemporary romantic comedy follows Riley, a 40-year-old woman rebuilding her life after the end of a long-term relationship. Looking for a fresh start, she joins a local tennis club and unexpectedly falls for Hunter, the club's charming 23-year-old tennis instructor. What begins as an unexpected attraction quickly turns into something deeper as both struggle with the realities of their age gap, outside expectations, and the question of whether their connection is worth the risk.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**

Courting You is an age-gap romance between a woman in her 40s and a man in his 20s. Performers should be comfortable portraying romantic attraction, chemistry, and flirtation within this dynamic.

**SCENE BEING FILMED**

The trailer focuses on Riley and Hunter's first meeting at a tennis club. After Hunter accidentally hits Riley with a tennis ball, he rushes over to check on her. The attraction is immediate—until they realize he's the instructor and she's the student.

Tone: Romantic, playful, flirty, contemporary rom-com with strong chemistry and a touch of tension.

**CHARACTER BREAKDOWN**

RILEY (Lead) | Female | 38–45

Riley is a travel writer—independent, adventurous, and globally savvy. Having spent much of her life charting her own course, she's never followed the traditional path expected of women her age. Recently out of a long-term relationship, she's at a crossroads, questioning who she is and what she wants next.

Witty, quirky, and effortlessly relatable, Riley uses humour to navigate uncertainty. When she meets Hunter, what begins as an unexpected attraction quickly becomes something more, forcing her to reconsider the future she thought she wanted.

Personality: Intelligent, warm, self-aware, dry sense of humour, emotionally guarded but hopeful.

HUNTER (Lead) | Male | 22–27

Hunter is a former elite junior tennis player who walked away from his professional ambitions to pursue a law degree. Freshly graduated, he's caught between the life he's always been told he should want and the freedom he's beginning to crave.

Responsible, level-headed, and naturally caring, Hunter has spent most of his life meeting expectations—particularly those of his parents. Beneath his calm exterior is someone eager to experience adventure, take risks, and discover who he is outside of everyone else's plans for him.

Meeting Riley awakens a side of himself he's never fully explored.

Personality: Confident but grounded, compassionate, dependable, mature beyond his years, quietly charismatic.

Requirements: Must be comfortable and believable playing an experienced tennis player. Strong tennis skills preferred. Height 6'0"+. Must be comfortable appearing shirtless for portions of the shoot.

CHEMISTRY BETWEEN LEADS

Riley and Hunter share an immediate, undeniable connection. Their dynamic is playful, flirtatious, and emotionally authentic, with strong romantic tension.

Casting Note: Chemistry between leads is the most important element of this project. Performers should be able to convey attraction, warmth, humour, and emotional depth with minimal dialogue.

**TO SUBMIT**
** Please send the following to: brianne.hogan@gmail.com**

**• Headshot**
** • Resume (if available)**
** • Recent photo(s)**
** • Brief note outlining any tennis experience**
** • Demo reel (optional)**
** • Optional: a short introduction telling us why you're interested in the role**

**Subject Line: *****Courting You – [Riley / Hunter]***

items.text:
Tancerki potrzebne do obłędnej ekipy Tancerze PL - najbliższe zlecenia 6, 13 czerwca 2026. Narazie szukamy osób dostępnych w czerwcu które już z nami tańczyły (!!!) - w tym wypadku dzwońcie do Sylwii: 602406111 . 

Inne Tancerki i Tancerze, którzy chcieliby dołączyć do grupy na stałe - wkrótce ogłosimy casting. Jeśli chcesz się zgłosić już teraz - zaobserwuj naszego instagrama i skomentuj ten post. Następnie wyślij zgłoszenie przez grupa@tamcerze.pl . 

Zlecenia są choreograficzne (Tancerki klubowe, gogo dancers, fordanserki - nie dadzą rady) - próby (na tę chwilę) wyłącznie w Warszawie. Opcjonalnie osoby z 3miasta i okolic.

Uwaga, wyłącznie osoby wszechstronne tanecznie z dobrymi podstawami tańca jazzowego lub klasycznego lub towarzyskiego. Tylko osoby z klasą, i eleganckim, naturalnym wyglądem (przesadnie usta, botox itp - to nie nasza estetyka) 

PS. Jeśli tańczysz tylko high heels, sambę, bachate… dowolną wąską specjalizację - a nie masz podstaw klasycznych - możesz spróbować, ale będzie ciężko dorównać do poziomu grupy. Zaobserwuj nas i poczekaj na casting

items.text:
⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director

items.text:
WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne.

sharedPost.text:
🐈‍⬛💰Pamiętasz emocje, gdy cała Polska wstrzymywała oddech przy otwieraniu bramek? WRACAMY! Reaktywujemy kultowe show
 „IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ” i szukamy właśnie Ciebie! 📺✨#BawSięiWygrywaj 

Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:
• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡
• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡
• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!
•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.
• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ (wymagany język polski). Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

🎭 EXTRA: Im bardziej szalony strój, tym lepiej! Przebierz się za dinozaura, policjanta, albo załóż najbardziej kolorowe ciuchy, jakie masz w szafie. Zróbmy show, o którym będzie głośno! 🦖🎨

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Nie zwlekaj, miejsca w studio znikają szybciej niż nagrody z bramek!
Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL
Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ
W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text: ✨ ZOBACZCIE TO CUDO! 😱🏆 OTO ONE, STATUETKI DLA LAUREATÓW NAGRODY PUBLICZNOŚCI! ✨

sharedPost.text:
✨ ZOBACZCIE TO CUDO! 😱🏆 OTO ONE, STATUETKI DLA LAUREATÓW NAGRODY PUBLICZNOŚCI! ✨

👉 CHCESZ JĄ ZDOBYĆ? ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ TERAZ I OD RAZU ZBIERAJ GŁOSY: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/ ☀️🌊

Mówiliśmy Wam, że tegoroczna nowość to absolutny hit... ale teraz mamy na to namacalny, lśniący dowód! 🌟 Podglądamy dla Was kulisy i prosto z pracowni pokazujemy te niesamowite, ogromne trofea, które trafią do rąk wokalistów z największą, najbardziej zmobilizowaną publicznością! 👥❤️

Wyobraź sobie, jak ta przepiękna statuetka dumnie prezentuje się na Twojej półce! Przepis na sukces jest prosty, ale kluczowy: LICZY SIĘ CZAS! ⏳🚨

Przypominamy, że w Ogólnopolskim Konkursie Piosenki On-Line „Wakacyjne Melodie 2026” Głosowanie Publiczności startuje NATYCHMIAST po tym, jak prześlesz nam swoje zgłoszenie i zostanie ono zatwierdzone przez naszą ekipę! 💻💥 Co więcej, zabawa w zbieranie punktów wcale nie kończy się 26 czerwca wraz z zamknięciem zapisów. Wasi fani mogą klikać i walczyć o to trofeum o wiele dłużej!

Wniosek? 🧠👇
Im szybciej Twoje wideo trafi na naszą oficjalną stronę, tym szybciej Twoja rodzina, znajomi, szkoła i fani będą mogli zacząć budować Twoją przewagę na liczniku! Każdy dzień zwłoki to oddanie punktów walkowerem innym wokalistom z całego kraju! 🏃‍♂️💨

Nie czekaj na ostatnie godziny rejestracji. Nagraj utwór (wystarczy smartfon i jedno naturalne ujęcie! 🎥💎), wyślij formularz, odbierz swój link i ruszaj po to cudowne, muzyczne trofeum! 🏆🎶

👉 FORMULARZ ZGŁOSZENIOWY: https://wakacyjne-melodie.pl/

#WakacyjneMelodie #NagrodaPubliczności #Statuetki #KonkursOnline #MłodziWokaliści #KonkursPiosenki #MuzyczneTrofeum

items.text:
Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of macrame and text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

items.text:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.
items.previewDescription: Stagebugz Theatre is a 501(c)3 youth theater company dedicated to providing accessible theatre education where every performer is valued and uplifted. We offer affordable acting and musical theatre classes, productions, and summer camps, free workshops, and family-friendly performances!
items.title: Youth Theater | Stagebugz Theatre | Littleton

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (CINEMA). 

Project title to be announced. Shoot begins August (exact dates for each characterTBC). 
Day rate £300 + expenses covered. 
Shoot location : In and around Birmingham area and other UK locations. 

Contact: Farhan Baqi 
farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk
Please send a couple of photographs or a Spotlight link. 

It is extremely important to mention the character name you are applying for in the subject line of the email please (Makes my life easier 😛 )

I would like to add that most of the below characters have decent amount of dates, these are not one or two liners roles and therefore looking for experienced / trained actors 

Roles: 

LIZ (18–24): (Ginger hair)
One of the key characters on this production.
Fun, confident British Caucasion girl with ginger hair and an outgoing personality. Loyal, courageous, protective of friends. Must have a Birmingham or surrounding‑area accent (or be able to perform one). Musical background a plus but not essential. 

IMRAN – BAND MEMBER (18–24): 
Imran is of Indian origin, must be able to speak Hindi. Energetic, creative young man recently moved to the UK. Passionate about music and community. Warm, expressive personality.

ANDRE – BAND MEMBER (18–24): 
Black / African British Third‑generation Caribbean Brit with charisma and rhythm. Natural performer with strong musical energy. Musical background ideal. 

SAMEER (18–24): 
Indian origin, Quiet, must be able to speak Hindi. thoughtful young man from Birmingham with glasses and a gentle nature. Introverted but empathetic. Knowledge of underground music scene helpful. 

ALEX (45–50): 
British / Caucasion  Stylish, articulate British choir director. Commands authority and carries emotional depth. Musical background would be great plus point

SATPAL SINGH – (40–55): 
Indian origin, must be able to speak Hindi. Respected figure from Birmingham’s Punjabi community. Charismatic, warm, principled. Strong emotional range required.

Thank you

Oksekødshyrdetærte
Ingredienser
450 g hakket oksekød
1 løg, hakket
2 fed hvidløg, hakket
2 kopper frosne blandede grøntsager (ærter, gulerødder, majs)
1/4 kop oksebouillon
1 spiseskefuld worcestershiresauce
2 spiseskefulde tomatpuré
1 tsk tørret timian
Salt og peber efter smag
4 kopper kartoffelmos (tilberedt på forhånd)
2 spiseskefulde smør (til topping)
Skal udtrykke noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter 
Fuld opskrift i den første kommentar

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FEMALE LEAD ASK ◉ SEE | Horror Short Film | Santa Ana, CA

Looking for an actress to play AMY — late 20s, any ethnicity. A woman in a relationship that's already over in everything but words. Cold, distant, unknowable. The role requires sustained physical stillness, comfort with intimate staging, and the ability to project unease with minimal dialogue.

Visually ambitious psychological horror short. Festival-targeted. Strong treatment and script available upon request.

Shoot dates: July 11, 12, Santa Ana, CA.

Compensation: IMDb credit, reel copy, meals on set.

To submit: DM @taylorballfilms on Instagram.

CASTING CALL — FEMALE LEAD ASK ◉ SEE | Horror Short Film | Santa Ana, CA

Looking for an actress to play AMY — late 20s, any ethnicity. A woman in a relationship that's already over in everything but words. Cold, distant, unknowable. The role requires sustained physical stillness, comfort with intimate staging, and the ability to project unease with minimal dialogue.

Visually ambitious psychological horror short. Festival-targeted. Strong treatment and script available upon request.

Shoot dates: July 11, 12, Santa Ana, CA.

Compensation: IMDb credit, reel copy, meals on set.

To submit: DM @taylorballfilms on Instagram.

items.text:
# CASTING CALL: "CASTAWAY" (Short Film)

**Project Type:** Short Film (LGBTQIA+ / Latinx Drama)

**Union Status:** Non-Union / Union

**Rate:** $250/Day (Estimated 3 days of filming)
**Language: **Spanish/English

**Location:** Chicago, IL

**Submission Deadline:** July 25, 2026
## ABOUT THE PROJECT

*Castaway* follows the story of Victor, a conservative man who makes the heartbreaking decision to cast out his teenage son, Jaime, due to his own traditional values and beliefs. When Victor begins to quietly question the beliefs that once defined him, he is pulled into a private reckoning. His marriage begins to crumble under the weight of his growing guilt and humanity.

## ROLES AVAILABLE
[SOFIA] — Main Talent
* **Ethnicity:** Latinx/ Latin America
* **Age Range:** 40–55 years old
* **Character Bio:** Sofia is the respected president of her parish council and carries herself with elegance, confidence, and authority. She is deeply devoted to her faith and community, often appearing composed and in control. Years ago, Sofia made a decision that fractured her relationship with her son. Her dedication to representing her faith and community has become both a source of strength and a shield against painful truths.
## KEY DATES & AUDITION INFO
* **Filming Timeline:** EST. 3 days total (Dates TBD and will be in either August, September, or October)
* **Audition Process:** Virtual callbacks for principal roles will be held via Google Meet.
## HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your headshot, resume, and reel via our Backstage submission link below:

[https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/](https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/)

*Local Chicago & Midwest talent is highly preferred.*

items.text:
THE BIGGEST MISTAKE WITH ACTING CLASSES YOU NEED TO KNOW
There’s a common problem in most acting training that no one really talks about.
And it’s what keeps a lot of actors STUCK for years, wasting time and money.

Most acting training focuses on FEEDBACK.

But feedback doesn’t make you a consistently better actor.

I was explaining this to an actor recently using a simple analogy.

If you’re trying to shoot a basketball into a hoop and you keep missing, it doesn’t help if someone just says “closer,” “more energy,” or “that wasn’t it.” 

What you need is the TECHNIQUE behind how to consistently get the ball through the hoop.

Acting is no different.

Actors don’t become bookable from one-off feedback.

Actors become bookable when they’re trained in a skill set that enables them to be exactly what casting directors are looking for in every audition.

For context, I’ve been working as an actor for 18 years across film, television, and stage.

My credits include series regular roles in two Netflix productions, six feature films in lead roles, Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood, and Wendy Darling in ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

I’ve taken what works in practice and developed a structured approach that builds CONFIDENCE, CONSISTENCY, and ultimately leads to BOOKING work. 

I’m curious. Is this something you’ve noticed about acting classes too? Let me know in the comments below.👇🏻 

DM me “ACTING” if you’re putting in the work but not seeing consistent results, and want to understand the simple technique that gets you booked. 📩

sharedPost.text:
Liebe Filmschaffende,
Faire Gagen läuft derzeit  nur noch auf Sparflamme und Du kannst das ändern. 
Gesucht werden möglichst aktive Filmschaffende im Bereich Komparserie und/oder Darstellung.

Dabei  unterstützt oder leitest Du eine äußerst beliebte und erfolgreiche Marke unter Filmschaffenden in Form von Beiträgen, informieren über beispielhafte oder unfaire Gesuche oder mit eigenen Ideen.

Engagier Dich für ein Ehrenamt, ganz ohne Druck bei absolut freier Zeiteinteilung 🤗
Gerne PN an Faire Gagen oder Klaus Stutzer

sharedPost.text:
+++ Agentur Producers Friend vs. Agentur Filmgesichter u.a. Agenturen +++

Ein bekannter Berliner Podcast bekommt die Frage: "Was sagt ihr zur Komparsen-Agentur Producer's Friend?" Die ehrliche Antwort folgt...

(Lesezeit ca. 3 Min.)

Seit vielen Jahren hat Faire Gagen und ein Großteil seiner Anhängerschaft eine klare Meinung zu diesem Vergleich. Ganz ähnlich sehen dies auch die Moderatoren Frank und Thomas beim beliebten Berliner Podcast "Frisch vom Set".

Hauptkritikpunkt ist auch hier das  als unfair angesehene Geschäftsmodell der Agentur.
Nur zwei kurze Zitate: "Selbst ohne Drehtag wird abgebucht" oder "Der Name der Agentur Producer's Friends sagt eigentlich schon alles ..."

Als besonders faires Gegenbeispiel wird u.a. im Podcast die größte Berliner Agentur, Filmgesichter genannt. 
Aber auch sehr viele andere Agenturen in Berlin, NRW, Hamburg und teilweise sogar in München zeigen uns tagtäglich und seit sehr vielen Jahren, dass es auch fair und damit gleichzeitig komparsenfreundlich oder "Extras Friends" funktioniert.

Aber wie auch im Podcast und mehrfach auch von uns an alle Filmschaffende appelliert:

+++ Wir alle müssen selbst entscheiden für was wir uns wert sind zu drehen +++

+++ Dabei dürfen wir jedoch nicht  vergessen, dass wir mit diesen - nunmal in unserem Sektor völlig unüblichen - Geldern doppelt bezahlen, da ja bereits die Produktionen unsere Agenturen und damit unsere Gagen bezahlen.
Leider setzen "wir" (ob bewusst oder unbewusst) unsere vielen fair agierenden Agenturen damit jedoch zwangsläufig einem nicht unerheblichen Wettbewerbsnachteil am Markt aus +++

So müssen "wir" uns selbstkritisch hinterfragen:

"Ist es fair, wenn wir uns unsere Drehtage bei Agentur PP förmlich erkaufen und womöglich gleichzeitig bei Filmgesichter (Berlin, NRW) Wanted, Müller, BB... (Berlin) 
Schwichtenberg, Ohler, WIWA, Eick&Weber... (NRW) Glocker ... (München) und den vielen anderen fairen Agenturen kostenlos (bzw. für zumindest überschaubare Gebühren) deren Fairness gerne mitnehmen um nicht zu sagen, einzusacken?
 
So liegt es (noch!) in unserer Hand, ob auch weiterhin unsere fairen Agenturen am Markt bleiben und nicht z.B. bedingt durch finanzielle Schieflagen sterben oder eben (notgedrungen) ähnlich bezahlte Geschäftsmodelle für uns entwerfen müssen um zu überleben (Beisp. DBF, München).

In unseren persönlichen Gesprächen mit den Agenturleitungen konnte man immerwieder heraushören, dass dieser Weg eigenlich nicht deren Philosophie sei - auch, da sie vor ihrer Agenturgründung oft selbst als Komparsen gearbeitet haben und unsere Arbeit, aber auch unsere Initiative recht gut kennen und damit unsere Beweggründe sehr gut verstehen. 
Die Lage ist jedoch teilweise recht ernst, wie bereits die Verbreitung von sogenannte Premium Modellen aufzeigt.

(Bitte gerne auf Faire Gagen  teilen o. zumindest reagieren, da nur so unsere textlastigen Beiträge eine größere Leserschaft erreichen, Danke🙂)

Link zum Podcast gleich in der Kommentarleiste.
 
Liebe Grüße 
Klaus
Initiative Faire Gagen 

... und nicht  zuletzt: Faire Gagen Sucht Nachwuchs🤗

#kompase #casting #filmschaffende #agenturen

CASTING CALL: “DR AMINA [SERIES]”  
Produced by Keba entertainment together with Ushkzan streaming App 
We are looking for passionate, dedicated actors to bring this project to life
  About the series
This is a story about life pressure, the cruelty of life , ambition , greed and crime and a young mother’s response to it.
  Production Details
• Location: Johannesburg, South Africa
• Schedule: AUG –SEP  (Weekends ONLY)
• Professional status: no-name , no agency young actors
• Compensation: Negotiable [daily or  series based rate –based on role] ; cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a professional  team
  Audition Instructions
Please submit a self-taped audition[using your phone] . You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you.
Email: kebaentertainment@kebaaiworld.com
Subject Line: ACTOR: DR AMINA SERIES
  Character Breakdown
PLEASE SEE ATTACHED POSTER
•   Why Be Part of  DR AMINA [series]?
This is more than just a Series — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a the reality haunting, South Africans  today; So whether you’re a student , no-name cast building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, DR AMINA [series] offers a unique and professional experience.
  We’re excited to see what you can offer.
Submit your audition and join us.

• age: 25 to 65 

• comfortable in front of the camera

• very short videos (around 1 minute)

If you’re interested, please send us (BreatheLio) a message with a short introduction and (if available) your portfolio or comment below.

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - EDINBURGH ‼️‼️
Hello, we are currently looking for a male actor for our student short film with Edinburgh College. We are aiming for film from the 6-9th of May and so are looking for someone who will be available within those days. 

Age - 25-26 ( Casting age - 25-27 or just an older looking 23 and above year olds.)
Identity - Straight, white, man, Scottish.
Personality - Narcissist, passionate, hot headed,
"nice" guy, controlling, and abusive.
Character Synopsis - Dany is dating a girl who discovers that her blood glows. He then discovers that he is obsessed with looking at the blood, and continues to ask his girlfriend (Bevan) to give him more of her blood. Disappointed when she can no longer produce what he wants, he leaves her.

Story Synopsis: A young girl discovers that her blood glows while harming herself. Panicked and disturbed by this discovery, she shows her boyfriend. Who, instead of having care or concern for her, starts exploiting her for her blood as he is enticed by it.
Struggling to perform and produce consistently for him, she grapples with self hate and worth, loosing grip on her mental state. Eventually, when her blood isn’t satisfactory for him anymore, he leaves her feeling worthless after sucking her dry of her youth and innocence.

If you are interested or want to know more please email our director at: ec1958677@edinburghcollege.ac.uk

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – Ulønnet kortfilm (Thriller)**
Vi søger to kvindelige skuespillere til en fiktiv thriller -kortfilm med titlen *“En dag i maj”*. Optagelserne forventes at foregå i 2 dage i af slutningen af juli eller begyndelse af august.

**Vi søger:**

* En birolle (ca. 20/ 25 år)

Af danske udseende. (Lyshåret)

* En kvindelige hovedrolle( ca.35/ 40 år) sydlandsk / brunette udseende (mørkt hår, brune øjne, / blå øjne )

Historien  hanlder om en stils fotograf, der en dag i en park imens er han er færd med at tage nogle billeder overvære et mord.

Kortfilmen er independant af en erfarne instruktør 

*

Med venlig hilsen

items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

📍 Birmingham
📅 June 17, 23, 27
⏰ 5 hours/day
💰 £400 total

✨ Requirements:
• Female, early–mid 20s
• Attractive, confident, outgoing
• Comfortable in bar/nightlife environment

💼 Responsibilities:

🎓 Training provided

📩 Apply: send **name + photos/model card**
👉 [wanwen.shao@sinowave.co.uk](mailto:wanwen.shao@sinowave.co.uk)

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Hi! I'm casting for a PAID GIG in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Seeking *REAL* ALLSTATE customers.

PAID • Non Union • Commercial

Dates: 1 shoot day June 23-27 OR Week of July 6, 2026

Must be local in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Are you an Allstate customer who can speak about one of the below experiences?

- Switched from another provider for Home or Auto insurance and saved money

- Purchased Allstate Home Insurance directly through Allstate

- Purchased Allstate Rental Insurance

- Purchased and Experienced Using Allstate Roadside Assistance

- Purchased Allstate Auto Insurance and Roadside Assistance as a bundle

topComments.text: Hi Hollie. Since we just found out about this is there another day or time for auditions besides tomorrow night? Morning? Or later this week?
This sounds like a lot of fun! Any particular types you’re looking for for the cast?

items.summary:
☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

We're buildin' a cast. We're buildin' a crew. And we're buildin' a movie.

If you've ever wanted to act, run camera, make content, tell stories, or just be part of somethin' bigger than yourself...

Now's the time to climb aboard.

🎬 Tomorrow • 6:30 PM
📍 Colorado Media School

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.
items.title: ☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

items.text:
BUILDING STAY LIVE

Design the Film • Play Along • Win Prizes

Ever wondered what it takes to turn a novel into a film?

Join us for a fun, interactive evening as we pull back the curtain on the STAY proof of concept and invite you into the filmmaking process.

Throughout the event, you'll help us make creative decisions, play along in live games, compete for prizes, and get an inside look at how we're bringing STAY from page to screen.

During the event we'll:

 Explore characters, locations, and visual ideas from the STAY universe

 Help design the world of STAY through live audience polls and discussions

 Learn what goes into creating a proof of concept and why we're making one

 Play "Guess the Budget" and see if you can correctly estimate real filmmaking costs

 Compete in fun character-based games and cast challenges

 Win STAY-themed prizes and exclusive digital goodies

 Learn how your support helps bring this story to life

Whether you've read the books, attended previous events, or are discovering STAY for the very first time, this event is designed to be interactive, entertaining, and welcoming to everyone.

Come play along, meet the team, and help us build the future of STAY.

 Date & Time:

June 8, 2026 @ 3pm PST, 4pm MST, 5pm CST, 6pm EST

 Platform:

Riverside

[https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl](https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS0d0OE5nZnF5TWVnbmhtQ3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR44MxgWb1RLT3_qROaFO1BN_IdZFHqvF_4MH7cEmbEPLXvGoNQdRb5wzT8BFA_aem_vzQT1Q-jEiMSrBOcmfWERw)...

 Prizes Available Throughout the Event

 Supporting the STAY Proof of Concept

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Gibt es jemanden, der aus Nähe Düsseldorf kommt und sich vorstellen könnte auch etwas mit Kindern zusammen zu machen? 
Wir schreiben unsere eigenen Lieder und brauchen jemanden, der dafür Beats produzieren könnte und auch die Möglichkeit hat zum Recorden.

Wenn dem so ist; einfach anschreiben, auch wenn die Nachricht im Spam landet, wir antworten auf jeden Fall. ￼

Danke im Voraus 🐥👑

items.text:
Nerdy Prudes Must Die - CASTING CALL

Casting call for the original Team Starkid Musical "Nerdy Prudes Must Die" for a run in London for the first week of October.

This is a profit share production and produced by Anomaly Ensemble, a London based theatre troupe, with rights granted from Team Starkid.

We are casting for the following roles:

Ruth Fleming

Solomon Lauter/Various Ensemble

Detective Shapiro/Various Ensemble

Mark Chasity/Various Ensemble

Overall dates: Rehearses July-September (dates tentative on cast availability)

Tech/Dress: September 29th-30th

Performance: October 1st-3rd

Please send an email to theanomalyensemble@gmail.com to express interest with the subject line with your name and the role you'd like to audition for.

items.text:
Looking for a showreel scene partner in London ☺🎬

Please get in touch if you are an American, male actor - playing age 22 - 30 - or share this if you know someone who matches this. 

Filming a short scene from an American series as part of my showreel some time July/ August, completely paid for by me but is pretty evenly split on camera time so would be good for both of our showreels.

Even if you fit the above and aren't American but can do a tip-top General American accent, would love to hear from you!

Thanks so much, and if you'd like any more info before saying yes, please message me ☺
