items.text:
DOCUMENTARY CASTING!

Casting a doc about deepfakes. It's aimed to focus on human impact-the trauma, confusion, and how people are coping or pushing back.

Who I’m looking for:

-Young people whose faces were used in deepfake videos, school bullying, or revenge

-influencers or content creators who have had their likeness misused 

-anyone hit by deepfake scams

-survivors who are speaking out or rebuilding 

-activists or anyone fighting against this, organizations aimed to combat or raise awareness or offer support of any kind

Stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com if you think you’re a fit- email me a little bit about yourself and your story and lets chat!  

Interviews are Paid, one hour long, and will shoot 7/22-24 in Los Angeles (flexible scheduling) No travel budget, LA locals only 

Thank you!

items.text:
CREW CALL

Hello everyone! Valerie Ibarra here! I’m still looking to fill several positions for my upcoming faith based film, ‘Discernment’. 

Although I would love to pay everyone (each of you are definitely worth the pay), unfortunately, this will all be volunteer. I’m aware that asking anyone to commit is a lot to ask, however, it’s difficult to find people at the very last minute. So if you’re willing to not only volunteer but also commit, please send in your submission along with a resume. Or if you happen to know anyone looking to gain the experience, please send them our way. We would love to have ALL positions filled by end of June. I truly appreciate everyone in advance. Details of the project are as follows: 

CREW CALL-DISCERNMENT

TITLE: Discernment, Feature film 

PAY: Unpaid (All roles volunteer), IMDb credit, Food/snacks/refreshments 

NOTES: Faith based, comical, drama, emotional, 

CREW:
2 – PA’S
1 – Sound/Boom operator
1 – Grip

DATES: August 20-23, August 28-29 

LOCATION(S):  Seattle/Tacoma (Exact Location TBD)

ALTERNATE DATE: September 4-6, 2026

USAGE: Film Festivals, Web, possible streaming platforms

UNION: Non-Union

COMPANY: IbaRuba Productions

PRODUCER/DIRECTOR: Valerie Ibarra

SUBMISSION: 
Initial: Email a resume to ibarubaproductions@gmail.com  
Subject Line: 
Attn. Discernment Crew Call

Additional Notes: NDA is required prior to receiving entire script

topComments.text: Try your family and friends. Are you paying for equipment. Then pay for your crew & talent.

items.text: Sin City Players is now less than 2 weeks away from the auditions for our third production, "Don't Talk to the Actors."  It is a full-length comedy about bringing a brand new show to the Broadway stage.  Auditions will be held at The Las Vegas Little Theatre on Monday June 22 and Tuesday June 23, from 7-9pm.  We are looking to cast 4 roles.  For information on the show, visit our website sincityplayers.org.  You can read the plot of the show and  click on the AUDITIONS tab for character descriptions.  Headshots and resumes are not required to audition, but will be accepted.  If you have any questions, prior to the auditions, please send us an email at sincityplayers@yahoo.com  There is no pay for this community theatre production but I assure you, you will have an amazing time with a creative and fun theatre company!  Hope to see you there!

sharedPost.text:
🌟 REGALLY ROYAL PARTIES 🌟

CASTING CALL – 
CHILDREN’S ENTERTAINERS Southport , Liverpool , Preston!! 

Do you love performing, bringing characters to life, and creating magical memories for children? We are looking for enthusiastic performers to join our growing team!

We’re looking for people who are:

✨ Confident and outgoing
✨ Reliable and professional
✨ Great with children and families
✨ Energetic and enthusiastic
✨ Strong performers (acting, singing, dancing, or character work is a bonus)
✨ Able to work weekends and school holidays
✨ Team players with a positive attitude
✨ Passionate about making children’s dreams come true

📅 AUDITION DATES
25th June
26th June

What we offer:

👑 Competitive pay
👑 Exciting performance opportunities
👑 Flexible work! You set your schedule
👑 Ongoing training and support
👑 A fun and rewarding working environment

Join the magic and become part of the Regally Royal Parties family!

📲 To apply, send us a message on WhatsApp: 07889 288335

📧 Or email us: regallyroyalparties@yahoo.com

Regally Royal Parties

Creating magical memories, one celebration at a time. ✨👑

Już 14 czerwca 2026 r. (niedziela) od godz. 9:00 na Stadionie Miejskim w Ciechanowie odbędzie się Turniej Charytatywny Piłki Nożnej, podczas którego 13 drużyn powalczy o Puchar Radnego Miasta Ciechanów Marka Łebkowskiego.

items.text:
PAID SPOKESPERSON CASTING – VANCOUVER

We're casting an on-camera spokesperson for a series of professional educational videos in the financial services industry.

We're looking for someone who feels natural, relatable, trustworthy, and authentic on camera. The ideal candidate should have a warm presence and be comfortable delivering scripted content in a conversational, approachable way.

Project Details

Presenter / spokesperson role

Speaking role

4-hour shoot

Compensation: $500

Filming in the Vancouver area

Videos will be used across website, marketing, sales, onboarding, and educational materials

What We're Looking For

Male or female

Approximately 35–55 years old

Strong communication skills

Comfortable speaking directly to camera

Natural, everyday appearance preferred over a traditional commercial/model look

Previous on-camera experience is an asset but not required

To Apply

Please send:

Recent headshot or photos

A short self-tape (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and delivering a few lines to camera

Send submissions to: colin@your-story.agency

Due to the volume of submissions, we will only be able to contact selected applicants. We sincerely appreciate everyone's interest and keep submissions on file for future opportunities.

topComments.text:
Hi Colin
What is the deadline to submit the audition tape?
do you have approx shooting dates?

items.text:
Dzień dobry!
Nazywam się Katarzyna Maria Zawadzka. Jestem aktorką oraz trenerką aktorstwa i wystąpień publicznych. 🎭

Oferuję wsparcie dzieciom i młodzieży w przygotowaniu do:

✨ castingów filmowych i reklamowych,✨ konkursów aktorskich,✨ wystąpień publicznych wymagających świadomej autoprezentacji.

Pomagam również w przygotowaniu profesjonalnych wizytówek aktorskich zgodnych z aktualnymi standardami branżowymi oraz w nagrywaniu scen castingowych. Prowadzę także regularne lekcje aktorstwa zarówno online, jak i stacjonarnie. 🎬

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 W swojej pracy wspieram również rodziców i opiekunów, zwłaszcza tych, którzy nie są związani z branżą filmową lub teatralną. Pomagam świadomie planować rozwój kariery młodych aktorek i aktorów, podpowiadam, jak odnaleźć się podczas castingów, na jakiej podstawie podejmować trafne decyzje dotyczące współpracy z agencjami i produkcjami oraz jak rozpoznawać potencjalne zagrożenia związane z działalnością w branży.

🤸‍♀️ Od niemal roku z powodzeniem współpracuję także z dziewczęcą grupą wyczynowej gimnastyki powietrznej. Wspieram zawodniczki w budowaniu postaci scenicznej do choreografii, rozwijaniu ekspresji, emocjonalności, charyzmy oraz świadomej interakcji z publicznością i jury.

🏆 Brałam również udział jako trenerka dziecięcych aktorów przy realizacji wielokrotnie nagradzanego na festiwalach filmu krótkometrażowego „Iron Cloud” w reżyserii Nikodema Wojciechowskiego.

📩 Zapraszam do kontaktu!Chętnie odpowiem na pytania i opowiem o możliwościach współpracy dostosowanych do indywidualnych potrzeb dziecka, młodzieży lub grupy.

📧 E-mail: kmzawadzkatrener@gmail.com

💬 Lub wiadomość prywatna

☎️ Lub tel. 732 561 386

Poprzez scenki, ruch, zabawę mini musical uczestnicy uczą się sie pracy emocjami, wyrazu scenicznego budowania pewności siebie. 15+ lat pracy dziećmi mini musical wystąpienia publiczne wyraz sceniczny dla dzieci 6-12lat 6-12 lat kameralne grupy Scena zaczyna się od odwagi!'

items.text:
Calling all young actors.
We are looking for individuals with a comedic flair or potential to feature in our social media content. Although this is an unpaid opportunity, the videos will be shared and can serve as valuable reels for future productions.

@highlight 

Applicants should be based in Etwatwa or Daveyton and audition via self-tapes, which can be sent to 078 121 4807 via WhatsApp. 

We will review all submissions and be in touch.

items.text:
#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Email: pakanita8@gmail.com

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair

items.text:
🚨 SEEKING PRODUCTION COMPANY / PRODUCING PARTNER FOR FEATURE FILM 🚨

I’m looking to connect with a serious production company, producer, or investor-aligned film team for my completed feature screenplay, **FIRST CONTACT**.

**Logline:**
A Connecticut construction foreman begins witnessing unexplained aerial phenomena no one else can see—until he becomes the unlikely bridge to humanity’s first peaceful contact with an extraterrestrial intelligence.

This is a **character-driven sci-fi feature** with:
🎬 completed screenplay
📘 pitch deck
📄 one-sheet / project snapshot
✨ franchise potential

Early Actor Attachments: 

Jeffrey Alan Solomon 

Emery Smith Gaia Television Host of "Cosmic Disclosure"

I’m Connecticut-based and looking for the right producing path for this project. If you are a producer, production company, or industry professional aligned with original independent features, I’d love to connect.

Please EMAIL me directly if interested or if you know someone I should reach out to. Please title subject line: FIRST CONTACT

Thank you 🙏
**Glenn E. Mate Sr.**

**Email: glennmatesr@gmail.com**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'A BEYOND HARMONICS PRODUCTION FIRST CONTACT The truth isn't out there. It's within. WRITTEN ΓΕΝ GLENN MATE WRITTENBYGLENNEMATESt SR.'

Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

• Indian woman (20–35)

items.previewTitle: Intro to Modern Clowning with Luka Wellman - 14th June — Makers' House Hastings
items.previewDescription: Join Luka Wellman, a member of the last cohort of students personally taught by Gaulier, and get a taste of what the school and the art form are all about. This one day introduction to clown will use a variety of exercises and games to help you discover your own clown persona , learn to find you
